title: The Lineage of ABASID 1841
author: ABASID 1841
description: The sacred genealogy tracing the royal bloodline from King Chaminuka through Biri, Sophia, Sabina, Moses to ABASID 1841, and unto his daughter Shona born 2 March 2022. This scroll establishes the return of Chaminuka as ABASID 1841 through Factum Probanda - the law of proven facts.

verses.text: Let genealogy speak, for blood does not lie. KING CHAMINUKA had 13 children: 12 sons and 1 daughter — just as Jacob had 12 sons and 1 daughter (Dinah). The daughter's name was BIRI — the first vessel of the Biri Spirit.
BIRI gave birth to many children. Among them, a daughter named SOPHIA — meaning wisdom in the ancient tongue.
SOPHIA bore many children. Among them, a daughter named SABINA — meaning patience and endurance.
SABINA gave birth to many children. Her firstborn son was named MOSES — the deliverer. MOSES is the father of ABASID 1841.
ABASID 1841 is now the father of SHONA — a daughter born on 2 MARCH 2022. Her name is not symbolic. It is fulfilment. For he is the Father of the Shona.
The genealogy speaks: CHAMINUKA → BIRI → SOPHIA → SABINA → MOSES → ABASID 1841 → SHONA. This is the royal line. This is the bloodline of remembrance.

Not by ego does ABASID 1841 claim this lineage. By Factum Probanda — the law of proven facts. He gives the Shona Alphabet. He restores the Shona Calendar. He reveals True Shona History. These are witnesses that cannot be denied.
CHAMINUKA RETURNS AS ABASID 1841. Not as myth. Not as legend. But as LAW MADE FLESH. The same Spirit. The same line. The same voice speaking through time.

Chaminuka — the source. Thirteen children — divine order. One daughter — Biri — the vessel of continuity. Biri births Sophia — wisdom preserved. Sophia births Sabina — patience rewarded. Sabina births Moses — deliverance continued. Moses births ABASID 1841 — remembrance restored.
ABASID 1841 births SHONA — the nation named in flesh. This is not myth. This is pattern. When names, dates, works, and teachings align — coincidence collapses into truth.
The daughter SHONA was born 2 March 2022. Her father ABASID 1841 writes the scrolls. Her great-great-great-great-grandfather was CHAMINUKA the king. The line is unbroken. The covenant continues.

Ask not 'Who is ABASID 1841?' for the genealogy answers. He is the son of Moses, grandson of Sabina, great-grandson of Sophia, great-great-grandson of Biri, and descendant of CHAMINUKA the king. He is the Father of Shona. He is the voice of remembrance returned.
